feed.title: garden.errbufferoverfl.me - evergreen
feed.description: An open collection of notes, resources, sketches, and explorations I'm cultivating.
feed.subtitle: Recent content in evergreen on
feed.author: errbuffoverfl
feed.rights: This content is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International unless otherwise specified.

entry.title: The Notebook

entry.title: The Soapbox

entry.title: The Microfarm

entry.title: Bookmarks
entry.summary: %% Begin Waypoint %% 5-types-of-threat-how-those-who-want-to-divide-us-use-language-to-stoke-violence 17-forbidden-places-you-cant-visit a-dangerous-pesticide-isnt-being-monitored-in-key-bird-of-prey-populations-were-shedding-light-on-that-gap a-list-of-programming-playgrounds a-massachusetts-bill-could-allow-prisoners-to-swap-their-organs-for-their-freedom a-racially-biased-scoring-system-helps-pick-who-receives-housing anatomy-of-three-leaked-us-intelligence-documents andrew-tate-research-has-long-shown-how-feminist-progress-is-always-followed-by-a-misogynistic-backlash anti-racism-and-anti-colonialism-an-open-letter-to-my-black-kin appropriate-technology-permacomputing-post-growth-and-ecomodernism april-king-refresh-vs-long-lived-access-tokens architects-anti-patterns-and-organizational-fuckery archive-stories artificial-intelligence-is-creating-a-new-colonial-world-order as-qanon-falters-european-followers-flock-to-a-financial-conspiracy australias-twice-extended-deadline-for-torture-prevention-is-today-but-weve-missed-it-again bad-fire-science-can-kill-our-threatened-species-its-time-to-cooperate-with-nature entry.title: The Art Studio
entry.summary: If you’ve been enjoying my work and finding it entertaining. Your support means the world to me, and I can’t thank you enough for being a part of this journey.

entry.title: The Anti-Library
entry.summary: a scholar conscious of the power of [their] antilibrary is not concerned with treating knowledge as a property to possess or consume; rather […] how much you don’t know—and how to find out that information when you need it.
